title: Minecraft but the Floor Changes Every Day
description: Every time a day passes, the entire floor changes to a different block.
body:
![Flat terrain, stretching into the distance, each chunk is composed of different blocks, creating a tiling effect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1682b796b60f144e02528213e541af47a6b6eb8c_0.webp)
## Overview
**This pack must be installed during new world creation!** It can't be used on pre-existing worlds.

This is a superflat challenge where at the start of every day, the entire floor changes to a different block. All 3 dimensions have been converted into superflat terrain and are each affected by the floor change. Each dimension contains the structures/mobs needed to beat the game.

If you'd like to make a video or content using this pack, go for it! If you do so, you must provide credit to me (Ambiguous Chameleon) and provide a link to this pack in the description and/or comments. Thank you!

## Cheats & Commands

**Immediately changes the floor to the block you are holding in your mainhand**

```
/trigger ac.sf_randomizer.change_to_block
```

**Toggles Disco Chunks option. When active, each chunk will individually choose a block to use for its chunk as opposed to all chunks using the same block. Off by default**

```
/trigger ac.sf_randomizer.disco_chunks
```

**Allows TNT to spawn as the floor! By default this option is off. Take care if you decide to turn it on**

```
/trigger ac.sf_randomizer.enable_tnt
```

**Moves time forward to the next day, triggering a floor change**

```
/trigger ac.sf_randomizer.add_day
```

**Uninstalls the data pack** _[data pack version only!]_

```
/function ac_cheat:uninstall
```
